footerDescription: Avilyre helps procurement and supply chain teams anticipate supplier failures with risk scoring and AI.

home.heroSubtitle: Avilyre helps you identify, assess and anticipate supplier risk — financial, operational, geopolitical and ESG — in real time.
home.featuresHeadingBold: A 360° view of your supplier risk.
home.featuresHeadingNormal: Centralize, score and anticipate. Never get caught off guard by a critical supplier failure again.
home.feature1Description: Every supplier gets a composite reliability score (0–100), automatically computed from 4 dimensions: financial, operational, geopolitical and ESG.
home.feature2Description: Get real-time alerts as soon as a supplier crosses a critical threshold. Configure your own trigger rules.
home.feature3Description: Visualize the geographic exposure of your supply chain and identify country-risk hotspots.
home.feature4Description: Export detailed compliance reports. Keep a complete history of every assessment for your internal and regulatory audits.
home.dimensionsSubtitle: A thorough multi-criteria assessment so you never miss a warning sign.
home.finalCtaHeading: Ready to secure your supply chain?
home.finalCtaSubtitle: Get started for free. No credit card required.

pricingPage.footerNote: 14-day free trial, no credit card required. Annual billing available (2 months free). Secure payment by Paddle.

faqItems.question: Do you offer a free trial?
faqItems.answer: Yes, a 14-day free trial with no credit card required. After that, you can subscribe to a paid plan or continue on a limited free tier.

faqItems.question: Can I cancel my subscription?
faqItems.answer: Yes, at any time, from your billing area or the Paddle customer portal. See our refund policy for the exact terms.

faqItems.question: Where can I find my invoices?
faqItems.answer: Your invoices are available in the Paddle customer portal, accessible from your billing area.

faqItems.question: What payment methods do you accept?
faqItems.answer: Card payments are processed by Paddle, our payment provider. Bank transfer is also available on request for our first customers.

faqItems.question: Can I upgrade or downgrade my plan?
faqItems.answer: Yes, you can move to a higher or lower plan at any time from your billing area.

faqItems.question: Where is my data hosted?
faqItems.answer: Your data is hosted in the European Union (Supabase), encrypted in transit and at rest, with strict isolation between customer accounts.
